meta.title: Text to Image World Championship (Stable Diffusion 2 vs. Midjourney v4 vs. Dall-e 2)
meta.description:
RESULTS:
Dall-e 2: 9 Votes
Midjourney V4: 46 Votes
Stable Diffusion V2: 7 Votes

Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

00:00 Intro
01:06 Competition Rules
02:18 Photography
05:52 Architecture
09:24 Art
13:06 Design
16:46 the end



In this video, we talk about text-to-image artificial intelligence models.
This is the first international competition that will help you define what is the best model for what you need.
We're going to try out the brand new version of stable diffusion, version 2.
https://stability.ai/blog/stable-diffusion-v2-release

versus one of the favorites
midjourney v4https://www.midjourney.com/

versus the first model ever: Dall-e 2
https://openai.com/dall-e-2/

contact to nobody or the computer: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
